rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the spread keeps returning to purpose / calling, with a right path emphasis. Past opens with Book (26), putting what is not yet visible in focus and setting the emotional weather around the reading. Book often points to private knowledge, research, what is not yet visible, and the need to learn before you declare certainty in your calling. At the pivot, Present places Clover (2) at the center, making this the point where the reading can shift. Clover colors your calling through small improvements that only matter if acted on quickly. Letter (27) in Future suggests written clarity improves confidence, once the middle-card pressure has been worked with directly. Letter colors your calling through the wording, terms, or explicit message that makes the path less vague and more livable. The path becomes clearest where Book (26) meets Clover (2): a blend of knowledge and luck, asking you to research deeply and disclose responsibly while staying alert to assuming fortune will remain without effort. Book (26) with Clover (2) keep emphasizing a blend of knowledge and luck, asking you to research deeply and disclose responsibly while staying alert to assuming fortune will remain without effort.
